ext_weather.shortForecast: Mostly Cloudy then Slight Chance Rain Showers
ext_weather.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers after 1pm. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 67. South wind 5 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
